name: The Silent - Boss Strategy
content: TBD - filled by Mode B postrun

scaffold.topic: Strategic approach to boss fights for this character
scaffold.scope: Principles for act-ending boss encounters, where HP fully restores between acts.
dimensions_to_consider: How boss fights differ from hallway fights — what the win condition requires given the longer timeline
How HP and potion usage compare to hallway combat
Front-loaded burst vs scaling commitment trade-offs
When to commit to a Power card vs continue applying pressure
How to recognize when the current build is insufficient for this boss and what options remain
out_of_scope: Per-boss mechanics or specific phase counters -> belongs in combat_guides
Specific Power-card play orders -> belongs in card_memory
Specific HP / damage thresholds tied to one boss

format_constraints.structure: 4-7 numbered principles. Each = one imperative declarative sentence + one short concrete example.

name: The Silent - Combat Principles
content: TBD - filled by Mode B postrun

scaffold.topic: Strategic approach to non-boss combat for this character
scaffold.scope: Generalizable principles applying to MOST hallway and elite encounters, regardless of the specific enemy.
dimensions_to_consider: How to allocate energy each turn (offense / defense / setup)
How to read enemy intents and react to multi-enemy boards
HP loss across the run — when is taking damage acceptable, when should it be avoided, and how does this scale across the act
Card sequencing within a turn (which card types resolve first)
When to spend potions in non-boss combat
How character-specific tempo levers work
out_of_scope: Per-enemy mechanics (round triggers, threshold patterns) -> belongs in combat_guides
Per-card play recipes or specific combos -> belongs in card_memory notes
Specific numerical thresholds tied to one situation

format_constraints.structure: 5-8 numbered principles. Each = one imperative declarative sentence + one short concrete example demonstrating application.

name: The Silent - Deckbuilding Principles
content: TBD - filled by Mode B postrun

scaffold.topic: How this character evaluates card and deck choices
scaffold.scope: Principles for adding, removing, and upgrading cards across the run; relic and shop decisions.
dimensions_to_consider: What dimensions of card value matter most for this character
Archetype commitment vs flexibility — when to commit to a build, when to stay open
Card removal priority and timing
Shop budgeting and gold allocation
When to skip rather than pick
out_of_scope: Specific card tier lists - belongs in card_memory notes
Specific archetype recipes - belongs in deck_guides
Specific gold thresholds tied to one shop visit

format_constraints.structure: 5-8 numbered principles, each one imperative sentence + concrete example.

scaffold.topic: How this character makes trade-off decisions at non-combat nodes
scaffold.scope: Resource investment and trade-off framing at rest sites and events.
dimensions_to_consider: Rest investment trade-offs (smith vs heal vs other)
Event trade-off framing (HP for relic, deck pollution for gold, etc.)
Which deck gaps to fill at non-combat nodes

scaffold.topic: How this character selects between map nodes
scaffold.scope: Forward-looking path selection given current run state.

How HP buffer should adjust path choice

Shop and rest pacing across an act
